page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoAI (Cost-aware AI) is a framework to enable any kind of AI predictive model (e.g., deep neural networks, tree ensemble models, etc.) to make accurate predictions given a small number of low-cost features.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoAI (Cost-aware AI) is a framework to enable any kind of AI predictive model (e.g., deep neural networks, tree ensemble models, etc.) to make accurate predictions given a small number of low-cost features.
